subtitle.weeklyDrop: Weekly matches drop every Monday midnight (Zurich time).
subtitle.decision: You must decide by Tuesday 12:00 (like/pass). If both like each other, you'll have 1 week to schedule a date.

countdown.openNow: Decision window is open now (Monday midnight–Tuesday 12:00).
countdown.closed: Decision window is closed. Likes and passes reopen next Monday midnight.

autoPaused.title: Your account is paused
autoPaused.penalty: Your account was automatically paused because you didn't add availability to your dates too many times (3 strikes). You won't receive new matches until you reactivate.
autoPaused.inactivity: Your account was paused due to inactivity — you haven't interacted with your matches for multiple weeks. You won't receive new matches until you reactivate.

selfPaused.title: Your profile is paused
selfPaused.body: You paused your profile. You won't receive new matches while paused.

healthWarning.title: Account Health Warning
healthWarning.inactiveMulti: ⚠️ You haven't interacted with your matches for {{count}} consecutive weeks. At 3 weeks your account will be automatically paused.
healthWarning.inactiveOne: You haven't interacted with your matches this past week. Please make sure to like or pass on your matches every Monday.
healthWarning.penalty: 📋 You have {{count}}/3 penalty strikes from not adding availability to dates. At 3 strikes your account will be auto-paused.

feedback.body_one: Feedback required to unlock new weekly matches. You still need to submit feedback for {{count}} completed date.
feedback.body_other: Feedback required to unlock new weekly matches. You still need to submit feedback for {{count}} completed dates.

events.heading: Event Matches
events.empty: You are signed up for an event. Your pairings will appear here once the event matching run is complete.
events.scheduleEnabled: Like or pass on your event matches. If you both like each other, a date will be scheduled at the event!
events.scheduleDisabled: These are your assigned event pairings. No date scheduling needed — just meet your matches at the event!

closed.title: Decision window is closed
closed.body: Weekly match cards are hidden after Tuesday 12:00 (Zurich time). Your next set appears next Monday midnight (Zurich time).

empty.title: No matches found yet
empty.body: New users are joining each week! We'll email you if we find a match :)

pausedBlocked.title: Your account is paused
pausedBlocked.description: Reactivate your account to like or pass matches.

toast.errorEdgeUnreachable: Debug function is not reachable. Deploy `debug-seed-date-flow` (or run local functions) and try again.

decisionClosed.title: Decision window is closed
decisionClosed.description: You can like or pass weekly matches during the decision window (Monday midnight–Tuesday 12:00 Zurich time).

liked.title: Liked!
liked.friendsMutual: You both want to connect as friends.
liked.friendsPending: If they wave back, you'll be connected as friends.
liked.eventScheduled: If they like you back, a date at the event will be created.
liked.eventNoSchedule: Thanks! You'll meet at the event.
liked.weekly: If they like you back, a date will be created.

matchRemoved.title: Match removed
matchRemoved.description: You won't see this person again.

reactivated.title: Account Reactivated!
reactivated.description: Your account is back! You'll receive matches again next Monday.

reactivateBlocked.title: Update your photos first
reactivateBlocked.generic: Your photos still need work before you can reactivate. Please go to your profile and upload at least one clear photo of yourself.
reactivateBlocked.noScreenshots: One or more of your photos is a screenshot. Please replace it with a real photo of yourself.
reactivateBlocked.photoTooDark: One or more of your photos is too dark to see anything. Please upload a well-lit photo of yourself.
reactivateBlocked.photoTooFlat: One or more of your photos appears blank. Please replace it with a real photo of yourself.
reactivateBlocked.photoTooSmall: One or more of your photos is too low-resolution. Please upload a larger photo.
reactivateBlocked.noFaceFound: We couldn't find a clear face in your photos. Please upload at least one photo where you're visible.
reactivateBlocked.faceDetectionUnavailable: We couldn't verify your photos right now. Please check your connection and try again, or contact support.
reactivateBlocked.fetchFailed: We couldn't load your photos to check them. Please try again in a moment.
reactivateBlocked.fileTooSmall: One or more of your photos looks like a thumbnail rather than a real photo. Please re-upload it.

recalculated.title: Matches updated!
recalculated.description: Your current weekly matches are being fetched.

debugCreated.title: Debug Match Created
debugCreated.withDate: Debug date created. Opening it now.
debugCreated.pending: 1 match created — they already like you. Like them back to start the date flow!
